scenario.key_phrase: I'm exploring, not ready to decide yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Namaste! Am I speaking with Arjun? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. I hope I'm not disturbing you. I'm calling regarding your interest in our JEE courses. How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Uh, hi. Yeah, I'm Arjun. I'm okay, I guess. Actually, I was just browsing your website yesterday.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful! I'm glad you're exploring our courses. So Arjun, which class are you currently in? And are you preparing for JEE specifically?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 11th right now. Yeah, JEE Main mostly. But I'm just... you know, looking around at different options.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, it's smart to research properly! Since you're in 11th, you have good time - around 20 months for JEE Main 2027, right? That's actually perfect timing. Have you started any structured preparation yet?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Not really. I mean, I'm doing some self-study and coaching classes locally. But I don't know... there are so many options. It's confusing.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I completely understand, Arjun. The good news is you're thinking about this at the right time. For JEE 2027, we have two excellent courses - JEE Lakshya at ₹35,999 and JEE Arjuna at ₹19,999. Both have live classes, doubt solving, and complete study material. What's your budget range for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Umm, I haven't really discussed budget with my parents yet. But honestly, I'm not ready to decide anything right now. I'm still exploring different platforms.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, that's totally fine! No pressure at all. These are important decisions. Just so you know, we offer 0% EMI options too - like Arjuna course comes to just ₹1,999 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Would you like me to call you back after you've discussed with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe... but I really need more time to think. There are other coaching institutes I want to check out too. Can I get back to you if I'm interested?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course, Arjun! I respect that you want to make an informed choice. Just remember, with PW you get Alakh Sir's proven teaching methodology at the most affordable prices. Can I at least send you our course brochure on WhatsApp so you have all the details?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I already have most of the information from your website. Look, I appreciate the call, but I'm really not in a rush to decide anything right now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely, no worries at all! Your education is a big decision and should not be rushed. How about this - can I call you back in a week or two? That might give you enough time to explore other options and discuss with your family?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yeah, maybe. But please don't call too frequently. If I'm interested, I'll reach out. Is that okay?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul theek hai, Arjun! I'll make a note of that. Just remember, we're here whenever you're ready. Our admission team is available if you have any questions later. All the best for your preparation!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thanks, Priya. I'll keep that in mind. Have a good day.
